title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 249.020 - Determination of population
text:
249.020.  Determination of population. — The last preceding federal census shall be used as a basis and for the purposes of ascertaining and determining the population of the counties that may come within the provisions of sections 249.010 to 249.420.
(RSMo 1939 § 12680) 
United States census, effective date of, 1.100
